_comment: Renders a fullscreen translucent colour overlay on top of the HUD.
This shader exists purely as a working example of Loom's shader system.
Tint          — vec4 RGBA tint colour, set per-frame by BuiltinTestShader
Intensity     — float alpha multiplier, set per-frame by BuiltinTestShader
The 'values' arrays below are the DEFAULT values snapshotted by
resets Tint and Intensity back to these values after each draw call.

uniforms._comment: Default: semi-transparent red. Java code overrides this each frame.
uniforms.name: Tint

uniforms._comment: Default: full intensity. Java code overrides this each frame.
uniforms.name: Intensity
